content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run an Engineering discovery session for your haircare line. New line or retrofit?
Retrofit of an existing cream-filling line to handle 150mL pump bottles.
Full utilities available. 15x30 foot footprint maximum for the retrofit.
IQ/OQ required. PQ on first commercial batch.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
